title: Clock in interface port mis-synthesized away (but accepted in modport)

features.name: interface with input port clock
features.description: Code should include an interface that declares clock and reset as input ports rather than internal logic signals

features.name: interface instance port connection
features.description: Code should include an interface instance with signals connected directly to interface ports using dot notation

features.name: module port with interface modport type
features.description: Code should include a module that declares an interface modport type as a port parameter

features.name: sequential logic with interface modport clock
features.description: Code should include an always block using posedge clock where the clock signal originates from an interface modport

features.name: interface with multiple modport declarations
features.description: Code should include an interface that defines multiple modports each with input port signals
features.snippet:
modport host(input clk, input rst);
modport device(input clk, input rst);
